title: Not an issue
author: realkompot
body:
Hello Daniel,

Great job!

You might find this funny :=) I liked the book very much (as you apparently did too) and after reading it I started to search the internet for what exists for Scott CPU. I came across your simulator and thought it'd be cool to create a simple compiler for it.
This is how a new hobby little project appeared: https://github.com/realkompot/llvm-project-scott-cpu

-rk
